original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求背景暗色调的女性高级礼盒面板或者放点黑白的玫瑰，
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry scene, Dark Premium Noir style. A single-strand beaded bracelet composed of uniformly sized, highly transparent spherical beads (Clear Quartz) acts as the hero, resting on a textured dark velvet jewelry gift box surface. The beads exhibit strong optical clarity and sharp specular highlights.
[Props]: Elegant monochromatic black and white roses are artistically arranged in the periphery, adding a romantic yet high-end touch without stealing focus.
[Background]: Dark, moody matte texture, emphasizing the brightness of the crystal beads.
Lighting is High-Contrast Jewelry Spotlighting, creating a 'glowing' effect on the refractive beads while keeping shadows deep."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (上文下图经典布局).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: \"至纯白月光\". Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [Elegant Serif Font, Glowing White or Silver]. Color: [White/Silver].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: \"高透体 · 强光感\". Style: [Clean and sharp, smaller font].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: \"七夕甄选礼盒\". Style: [Minimalist Black and Gold Label].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: \"天然保真\". Style: [Thin Gold Circle Line Art]."
layout_logic: Since the user requested a 'Dark Tone' background and the product is 'Transparent/White', the best contrast strategy is to use White or Light Gold typography for the text. Place the bracelet in the lower center to anchor the composition. Use the upper 1/3 of the image (the dark empty space) for the Main Title to ensure it 'pops' without obstructing the product details. The black and white roses should remain in the soft-focus background to guide the eye toward the sharp, bright bracelet.
